scope: every shipped mattbucci/*-AWQ dir on /data/models/hf-mattbucci (native AWQ; CT-format dirs skipped — reader is native-AWQ only)
method: scales-only triage across the fleet, then --base resolution where the upstream BF16 is on disk; base-absent legacy ships characterized by flag location
headline: All shipped AWQ models are scale-integrity clean — zero real zero-over-live (v2-disaster) defects. Every flag resolved to benign MoE dead-channel structural sparsity.

Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-AWQ.note: 144 benign layer-0 expert gate/up dead channels (~7.8e-38)

Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-REAP-AWQ.note: 2 flags = 1 expert (L1 e18) ~52% dead gate/up at ~1e-26; resolved by raising DEAD_THRESH 1e-30 -> 1e-15

Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-REAM-AWQ.note: 2 flags = 1 expert (L1 e25) ~52% dead gate/up at ~1e-26

Qwen3.5-28B-A3B-REAP-AWQ.note: 114 = 57 gate + 57 up, all layer-0 experts — identical benign dead-channel signature to the --base-verified Qwen3.6 family (same DeltaNet+MoE arch). Not --base-verified (3rd-party base absent).

Qwen3.6-VL-REAP-26B-A3B-AWQ.note: 114 = layer-0/1 expert gate/up benign pattern. SEPARATELY known vision-broken (atbender pre-prune stripped vision tower) — a capability defect, not a scale defect. Rebuild planned.

Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ-4bit-calibrated.note: non-conforming name (should be Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ per HF convention)

capability_state_v0512.note: thinking + image + video preserved on every multimodal MoE ship — directly satisfies the calibration hard-constraint

context_256k_state.target: single-user 256K context (the rig's north-star; multi-user secondary)
context_256k_state.serves_full_256k: all shipped presets serve 262K / model-card max EXCEPT Qwen3-VL-32B-AWQ (131K model-card cap — a constraint, not a defect)
context_256k_state.vram_fit: verified by the VRAM context-limits table in README; AWQ-int4 + REAP/REAM keep 256K KV inside 48 GB
context_256k_state.measurement_gap: fresh v0.5.12 long-context tok/s sweeps + 256K Needle retrieval are NOT yet measured (v0.5.11 tok/s data tops at 16-32K; v0.5.11 Needle topped at 65K). Both GPU-gated behind the bake-off sweep.
context_256k_state.eval_fix_2026-06-01: eval_quality.py Needle default extended 1K-65K -> 1K-250K with context-scaled timeout so the quality eval verifies retrieval AT the 256K target; bench_long_context.py already reaches 262144. Future: vary needle depth (not just mid-context) at 256K.

known_quality_issues: Qwen3.6-VL-REAP-26B-A3B-AWQ: vision broken (3rd-party atbender pre-prune). Rebuild from upstream BF16 planned.
Gemma 4 21B REAP: HumanEval 0% (REAP prune lost coding capability) — use gemma4-31b for code.
Several 3rd-party-base legacy ships (REAP-25B Cerebras, VL-REAP atbender, Qwen3.5-28B-REAP Cerebras) grandfathered pending in-house rebuilds.
data_gaps: Static quality evals (MMLU/HumanEval/LAB-Bench/Needle) are v0.5.11-era for 7 ships; v0.5.12 re-runs are GPU-gated behind the running opencode-baseline sweep (Rule 1).
opencode-baseline bake-off cells for devstral/gemma4-31b/qwen3-ream/coder-30b/coder-30b-eval/coder-reap-25b/qwen36-ream are in progress (sweep running).
